subject: Re: taking a break
body:
Hi Alister,

Thank you for all your help and encouragement over the years on this forum 
and the Dynamo message boards!

I know many of my projects would not have been possible without your 
tutorials, quick replies, and python libraries.

Enjoy the break!

There should be plenty of collective knowledge in the community to field 
questions in your absence.
 
Cheers!
-Tom

On Friday, January 30, 2026 at 10:06:13 PM UTC-8 alist...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi all,
>
> I’m about to take an extended break from work so won’t be responding to 
> any messages about warp/tomography/subtomogram averaging.
>
> Apologies if you’ve been left hanging recently, I know I’ve not been on 
> top of the mailing list/github issues.
>
> Tomography is still tough, please be generous with your knowledge if you 
> see someone asking for help.
>
> Take care and happy processing,
>
> Alister
>
> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
